messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Create a small library with one function and a unit test.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Create a small library with one function and a unit test.",
  "decompositionStrategy": "Sequential incremental development: define the goal, scaffold the project, implement the single function, add a unit test, run and fix until tests pass, then document and prepare the package for use or distribution.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "define-scope-and-interface",
      "title": "Define scope and function interface",
      "description": "Decide the library purpose and specify the one function's name, inputs, outputs, and edge cases to handle.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A short spec exists describing function name, argument types, return type, expected behavior, and edge cases."
    },
    {
      "id": "scaffold-project",
      "title": "Scaffold project structure",
      "description": "Create project folder, initialize repository, add language-specific layout (src, tests), and add build/test config files.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-scope-and-interface"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository with src and tests directories and basic config (e.g., package.json, pyproject.toml, or setup files) is present."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-function",
      "title": "Implement the single function",
      "description": "Write the function code in the source directory following the defined interface and include inline comments for non-obvious logic.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "scaffold-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Function file exists, compiles/loads without syntax errors, and implements the behaviors from the spec."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-test",
      "title": "Write a unit test for the function",
      "description": "Create a unit test that covers typical cases, at least one edge case, and asserts the expected outputs for the function.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-function"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "A test file exists that imports the function and contains assertions for normal and edge case behaviors."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-tests-and-fix",
      "title": "Run tests and fix issues",
      "description": "Execute the test suite, debug failures, update function or tests until all tests pass, and ensure no regressions.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "write-unit-test"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All unit tests pass reliably in the local environment or CI, and any fixes are committed."
    },
    {
      "id": "document-and-package",
      "title": "Document the library and prepare release",
      "description": "Add a README with usage examples, update version info, and create a distributable package or installation instructions.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "run-tests-and-fix"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README contains usage example and installation steps; package metadata is present and a build (if applicable) succeeds."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6
}
